title: Price's Candles Petali Range Bubbles Pack of 18 Scented Tea Lights Candle for Home & Events | 4 Hour Burn Time Scented Candles for All Occasions | Long Burning Tealights Gifts for Women & Men
features: SCENTED TEA LIGHTS FOR EVERY MOOD: Create the perfect atmosphere with these scented candles, ideal for relaxing evenings, home décor, or festive occasions where soft candle lights add warmth and charm.
PACK OF 18 TEALIGHTS WITH 4-HOUR BURN: These tealight candles offer a consistent burn time of up to 4 hours, making them perfect for extended dinners, celebrations, or peaceful moments at home.
ELEGANT DESIGN FOR ANY SETTING: These mini candles are suitable for lanterns, holders, or table displays and work beautifully as tea candles for events, aromatherapy, or ambient lighting.
GREAT FOR GIFTING AND HOME USE: Ideal as gifts for women and men, these stylish candles suit birthdays, housewarmings, or holiday celebrations, adding value to any gifting moment.
PREMIUM QUALITY FROM PRICE’S CANDLE: Enjoy trusted craftsmanship with Price’s tealights, offering clean-burning, low-smoke scented tea lights perfect for indoor or outdoor setups.
